positive: Minimalist geometric mountain range silhouette against a vibrant sunset gradient, clean vector style, high contrast, warm terracotta, deep indigo, and burnt orange color palette. The composition should feature stylized, overlapping mountain peaks that look excellent as a repeating pattern or a singular striking central motif. The sun is represented by clean, sharp radiating lines, not a soft circle. Graphic print design quality, suitable for apparel. Isolated on a clean, complementary background.
